changes: Modified `collect_card_groups()` to compute git_root once and pass to `collect_card_views()`
Updated `collect_card_views()` signature to accept `git_root: Option<&Path>` parameter
Integrated enrichment call: `acplan::enrich_card_view(&mut view, &meta, gr)` after base view creation
Updated both root card and team card collection calls with new parameter

patterns_discovered.name: Single-Source-of-Truth for git_root
patterns_discovered.description: git_root is computed once in `collect_card_groups()` via `acplan::find_git_root(root)` and threaded through both recursive call paths
patterns_discovered.benefit: Eliminates redundant git root lookups per card and maintains consistency across root/team card processing

patterns_discovered.name: Optional Enrichment with Conditional Guard
patterns_discovered.description: Enrichment is applied conditionally: `if let Some(gr) = git_root { acplan::enrich_card_view(...) }`
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintains backward compatibility and allows graceful degradation when git_root cannot be determined

patterns_discovered.name: Immutable Base → Mutable Enrichment
patterns_discovered.description: CardView is created via `render::from_meta()`, then mutated in-place during enrichment phase
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear two-phase construction where enrichment is an optional post-processing step

gotchas_discovered.issue: Dual Call Sites Require Consistent Parameter Updates
gotchas_discovered.description: Function called from two locations (root cards at line 137 and team cards at line 155); both required parameter updates
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Both call sites now pass `git_root.as_deref()` consistently

gotchas_discovered.description: `acplan::find_git_root()` likely returns `Option<PathBuf>`; must convert to `Option<&Path>` for function signature
Enrichment call `acplan::enrich_card_view()` has no visible error handling; unclear if failures are logged
gotchas_discovered.risk: Cards may have incomplete plan data without diagnostic output

approach_details.strategy_used: Direct integration of enrichment into existing card view collection pipeline
execution: Modified collect_card_groups() to compute git_root once
Updated collect_card_views() signature with git_root parameter
Integrated enrichment call after base view construction
approach_details.result: Plan enrichment now flows through card collection; cards with ac_spec_id are populated with Auto-Claude plan data (phase, progress, subtask counts)

recommendations.item: Add tracing/debug logging to `acplan::enrich_card_view()` to diagnose enrichment failures silently
recommendations.reasoning: Current implementation may mask missing spec data without user awareness

recommendations.item: Document the expected spec directory structure that enrichment function requires
recommendations.reasoning: Callers need to understand what data source the enrichment function expects to find at git_root

recommendations.item: Consider caching git_root computation if collect_card_groups() is called frequently
recommendations.reasoning: Currently recomputed per invocation; could be memoized if performance becomes concern
